scripts.build: npx tailwindcss -i ./src/style.css -o ./dist/output.css --minify && npx terser ./src/main.js -o ./dist/main.min.js --compress --mangle && npx copyfiles logo_youssef.jpg assets img All-project Youssef_Yasser_FrontEnd_CV.pdf WILDFLOWER.mp3 dist && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); html=html.replace(/\.\//g,''); html=html.replace('dist/output.css','output.css'); html=html.replace('dist/main.min.js','main.min.js'); html=html.replace('src/main.js','main.min.js'); html=html.replace('src/main.optimized.min.js defer></script>',''); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',html);"
